allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse "$env:TEMP\\lcc-web-sdk-060\\sdk" | Select-Object FullName, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String -Width 250; Write-Output "===EXAMPLES==="; Get-ChildItem "$env:TEMP\\lcc-web-sdk-060\\examples" | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "===README==="; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\lcc-web-sdk-060\\README.md" -Raw)

PowerShell($f = "$env:TEMP\\lcc-web-sdk-060\\sdk\\lcc-0.6.0.js"; $c = Get-Content $f -Raw; Write-Output "=== xgrids/logo/brand ==="; [regex]::Matches\($c, "\(?i\).{60}\(xgrids|logo|splash|watermark|poweredby|powered by\).{60}"\) | Select-Object -First 15 | ForEach-Object { $_.Value }; Write-Output "=== createElement / DOM injection ==="; [regex]::Matches\($c, "createElement\\\(.{1,30}\\\)"\) | Group-Object Value | Select-Object Count, Name | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($f = "$env:TEMP\\lcc-web-sdk-060\\sdk\\lcc-0.6.0.js"; $c = Get-Content $f -Raw; Write-Output "=== class Ls \(watermark\) ==="; $i = $c.IndexOf\("class Ls"\); if \($i -ge 0\) { $c.Substring\($i, 3000\) })
